subject: Your District Will Probably Pay for This
previewText: How to get your school district to invest in your professional development.
body:
Hi [Name],

As a dedicated school-based professional, you're always looking for ways to improve your skills and get better results for your students. But professional development can be expensive, and it's not always easy to find the time or the money to invest in yourself.

Here's the good news: your school district will probably pay for it.

Most districts have funds set aside for professional development, especially when it's directly related to improving student outcomes. The key is to make a compelling case for why a particular training or resource is a good investment.

Our flagship course, The Behavior Analyst's Playbook, is designed to give you the skills and confidence you need to excel as a school-based BCBA. And we've made it easy for you to get your district to foot the bill.

We provide you with a pre-written proposal that you can customize and submit to your administrator. The proposal outlines the benefits of the course, how it aligns with district goals, and how it will ultimately save the district time and money.

Don't let budget be a barrier to your professional growth. Click here to download the proposal template and take the first step towards becoming a more effective and confident behavior analyst.

[Link to Download the Proposal Template]

Best,

The BehaviorSchool Team
